title: About Me
text:
I am a Business Analytics student with hands-on experience in business intelligence, project analysis, and operational improvement. My work focuses on transforming data into actionable insights that support strategic decision-making and improve business performance.
I bring a combination of analytical skills, business understanding, and real-world experience working with cross-functional teams in dynamic environments across U.S. and Latin American markets.

title: About Me
text:
I am a Business Analytics student with hands-on experience in business intelligence, project analysis, and operational improvement. My work focuses on transforming data into actionable insights that support strategic decision-making and improve business performance.
I bring a combination of analytical skills, business understanding, and real-world experience working with cross-functional teams in dynamic environments across U.S. and Latin American markets.

title: About Me
text:
Professional Experience
I have developed my analytical and business skills through roles in business intelligence, project analysis, and operations:

As a Business Intelligence Analyst Intern, I built dashboards to support executive decision-making and identified key drivers of customer churn, contributing to a 15% reduction in attrition.

As a Project Analyst, I conducted structured audits and led stakeholder meetings, helping reduce revision cycles by 30% and improving process efficiency. :contentReferenceoaicite:1

In operations, I improved workflows and reduced variability by 20% through training and process standardization.

These experiences strengthened my ability to connect data analysis with real business impact.

title: About Me
text:
What I Do

Build interactive dashboards using Power BI to support business decisions

Analyze and extract data using SQL

Develop business and financial models in Excel

Identify operational inefficiencies and recommend improvements

Work with stakeholders to translate data into actionable strategies

title: About Me
text:
Skills

Technical Skills

Power BI (Dashboards, DAX, Data Modeling)
SQL (Joins, Aggregations, Data Cleaning)
Excel (Financial Analysis, KPI Tracking, Forecasting)



Business & Analytical Skills

Data Analysis & Business Insights

Project Management & Process Improvement

Cross-functional Collaboration

Problem Solving

title: About Me
text:
Education
Brigham Young University - Idaho
Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics (Expected July 2026)
GPA: 3.88
Relevant Coursework: - Financial Analysis
- Strategic Planning
- Business Strategy
- Project Management

title: About Me
text:
Career Focus
I am seeking opportunities as a Business Analyst or Data Analyst, where I can leverage data, analytics, and business insight to drive performance, improve processes, and support strategic decisions.

title: Ivan Ribeiro’s CV
text:
📍 Rexburg, ID
📧 elivandsonribeiro@gmail.com
📞 (385) 221-2372
🔗 LinkedIn
💻 GitHub



Business Analytics student with experience in business intelligence, project analysis, and operations. Skilled in Power BI, SQL, and Excel, with a strong focus on transforming data into actionable insights that support decision-making and improve business performance.




Brigham Young University - Idaho
Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics / Finance
Expected Graduation: July 2026
GPA: 3.88
Relevant Coursework: - Financial Analysis
- Strategic Planning
- Business Strategy
- Project Management





Power BI: Dashboards, DAX, Data Modeling

SQL: Data Extraction, Joins, Aggregations

Excel: Financial Analysis, KPI Tracking, Forecasting







Brigham Young University - Idaho — Rexburg, ID
Jan 2025 – Present

Conduct structured audits across 15+ courses per semester to ensure compliance and content quality

Lead cross-functional meetings with 5–8 stakeholders to implement solutions

Reduced revision cycles by 30% through process improvements





Taylor Corporation – The Occasions Group — Rexburg, ID
Sep 2025 – Dec 2025

Led training initiatives for 30+ employees to standardize processes

Collaborated with operations and leadership teams to improve workflow efficiency by 20%





4Life Research — Sandy, UT
Oct 2024 – Dec 2024

Built Power BI dashboards to monitor revenue and retention across LATAM markets

Identified key churn drivers, contributing to a 15% reduction in attrition

Partnered with cross-functional teams to resolve reporting and system issues





BYU-Pathway Worldwide — Salt Lake City, UT
Jul 2023 – Oct 2024

Evaluated project management tools through stakeholder analysis and cost-benefit studies

Supported selection of Monday.com, reducing status update requests by 40%

Built dashboards to improve executive visibility and reduce project variance by 25%





4Life Research — Sandy, UT
Aug 2018 – Aug 2021

Managed performance and relationships for 500+ consultants

Analyzed regional sales data to identify growth opportunities

Delivered training and support to improve engagement and business performance








BYU-Idaho — Jan 2026 – Present

Analyzed sales and inventory data using Excel and Power BI

Identified merchandising gaps and revenue optimization opportunities







Data Analysis & Business Insights

Process Improvement

Stakeholder Collaboration

Bilingual: English & Portuguese

title: Home
text:
I am a Business Analytics student with experience in Power BI, SQL, and Excel, focused on transforming data into actionable business insights.





Power BI (Dashboards, DAX, Data Modeling)
SQL (Data Extraction, Joins, Aggregations)
Excel (Financial Analysis, Forecasting, Dashboards)
Data Analysis & Business Insights








Built an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze sales performance

Identified key revenue drivers and growth opportunities





Developed queries to extract and analyze business data

Improved reporting efficiency and decision-making






Seeking opportunities as a Business Analyst or Data Analyst to leverage data for strategic decision-making.
